patch_type: Runtime action queue over V58 Operational Trust Control Pane
release_chain_status: V58.1 is the current implemented build. It loads after V58 in src/ui/v52-7-operational-layer.js. It converts operational trust findings into a prioritized executive action queue with owner, evidence gap, runtime action, recommended next move, and proof-ready status while preserving no-new-top-level-tabs rule. GitHub Pages browser QA is required after deploy.
top_level_tab_rule: Do not add more top-level tabs. Upgrade existing workspaces only.
version_label_rule: Build and version labels belong in Settings/admin metadata and repo documentation only. They must not appear as executive-facing dashboard content.
public_naming_rule: Public product name is CyberShield Executive OS. Current prototype build is V58.1. Do not call the public build CyberShield OS v8 unless the repo, README, loader, Settings/admin metadata, and public UX intentionally move to that version scheme.
controlling_doctrine: No score without a model. No model without evidence. No evidence without traceability. No action without consequence.
v58_1_changes: adds Runtime Action Queue into Runtime
adds Runtime Action Queue into Briefing
adds prioritized queue items with owner, evidence gap, risk if wrong, next move, route, and proof-ready status
adds route buttons to existing workspaces
preserves V58 Operational Trust Control Pane
preserves V57.1 Board and Executive Narrative Layer
preserves V56.4 Core Trust Scoring Models
preserves V56.3 Universal Score Object and Score Band Contract
preserves V56.1 Evidence and Assumption Register

runtime_action_queue.boundary: Static advisory prototype only. No live workflow, tickets, notifications, monitoring, evidence retrieval, or enforcement.

internet_trust_engine_future_track.sequence_note: V58.1 improves runtime action traceability needed before future Internet Trust Engine work, but does not implement live artifact analysis, live scoring, claim extraction, evidence retrieval, or internet verification.

recommended_next_build.label: V58.2 Runtime Action Queue to Proof Pack Trace Linkage
goals: connect queue items directly to related decision records
connect queue items to related evidence register items
connect queue items to Proof Pack sections
connect queue items to board narrative language
do this without adding a new top-level tab

prototype_boundary: The current GitHub Pages build is a lightweight static advisory prototype. It is not connected to live enterprise telemetry, SIEM, EDR, IAM, Microsoft 365, cloud control planes, GRC tooling, production agent enforcement, Google Sheets, CRM sync, ticketing, notifications, marketplace systems, ad platforms, domain-intelligence systems, identity verification systems, CMMC certification systems, healthcare compliance validation systems, banking/payment systems, live monitoring, live evidence retrieval, live scoring, live claim extraction, internet claim verification, report delivery, ticketing, workflow automation, notifications, or takedown automation.
known_limitations: Runtime Action Queue uses static prototype and loaded in-browser registry data
Action queue does not perform live monitoring
Action queue does not retrieve live evidence
Action queue does not create tickets, send notifications, send reports, or trigger workflows
Action queue does not enforce, block, refuse, or quarantine actions in live systems
Action queue download is a text file, not a branded PDF or board deck
Internet Trust Engine is documented as a future requirement track but is not yet implemented
GitHub Pages browser QA required after deploy
